title: Mine Co. Renewed
description: A 16x resource pack that aims to transform the look of minecraft while sticking close to the vanilla color palette. Perfect for use on servers!
body:
![Mine Co. Renewed Splash](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1015688b6159c8e93d3ffa979d6e69c90d53b84.png)


Mine Co. Renewed is a transformaitve 16x resource pack that aims to overhaul the minecraft game art with a more stylized and slightly industrial look. This pack attempts to fix an issue I have personally always had with using resource packs on servers where often your builds will look great to you, but will look strange to anyone who is using the vanilla minecraft textures. This resource pack sticks very close to the default color palette of vanilla minecraft, which means if you are building on a server your builds will look great for people who are using vanilla as well!

# Features
- Complete retexturing of all game assets
- Random Texture varients for many natural blocks 
- Custom animal and monster textures
- Overhauled game UI

# Comparisons
![Comparison image 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae5e87d20912d1a3683874f9f57fb82d3a911d6f.jpeg)
